description: Correct-but-unoptimized 1-D 3-tap stencil (out[i] = in[i]+in[i+1]+in[i+2]). Optimization-loop demo: csim already PASSES; the outer loop is not pipelined and `in` is a single-port memory, leaving real PPA headroom. Cyclic-partitioning `in` + pipelining the loop gives parallel reads -> large latency drop without changing results.
expected: csim_pass=true; optimize lowers latency while keeping csim_pass=true
